overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077, walking through a neon-lit Asian-inspired urban market at dusk. The player navigates narrow alleys, elevated walkways, and covered market stalls adorned with red paper lanterns and holographic advertisements.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow cyberpunk back alley with food vendors

events.description: passing steam vents releasing mist across the pathway

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the narrow alley, passing food stalls and steam vents

entered.detail: food stall with bright green neon OPEN sign and wooden crates
vertical neon sign reading ELEVATOR in cyan letters
string of traditional red paper lanterns hanging overhead
floor vent releasing white steam into the alley

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a narrow cyberpunk alley with a food stall featuring a green neon OPEN sign. The camera moves forward past an elevator sign and steam vents, with red paper lanterns visible overhead. The environment is enclosed by tall buildings with wet concrete pavement.

scene_state.functional_zone: open-air market square with elevated walkways

events.description: turning right from narrow alley into open market area with food carts
entering area with dense red lanterns and increased neon signage

agents.ego_description: turning right into the market square and walking among food stalls and pedestrians

notable_agents.action: person in white shirt walking across the market square

entered.detail: wooden food cart with menu displays and cooking equipment
metal railing of elevated pedestrian walkway
tall building covered with holographic advertisements and neon signs

segments.scene_description: The camera turns right from the narrow alley into a more open market square with moderate pedestrian activity. Food carts and market stalls line the path, while an elevated walkway becomes visible. Red paper lanterns become denser overhead as the scene transitions to a mixed lighting environment with both natural dusk and neon illumination.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated pedestrian walkway overlooking lower market level

events.description: beginning descent down stairs from elevated walkway to lower market level
transitioning from elevated view to ground level market area

agents.ego_description: walking along elevated walkway then descending stairs to lower market level

notable_agents.action: person in orange jacket walking ahead on the pathway

entered.detail: concrete stairs leading down to lower market level with metal railings
bright red and white vending machine with illuminated display

segments.scene_description: The camera moves along an elevated walkway with views of the lower market level, passing vending machines and food stalls. The scene transitions as the camera descends stairs to ground level, with large digital billboards becoming more prominent in the background. The environment remains semi-covered with neon lighting dominant.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered market corridor with food vendors and neon signage

events.description: entering covered walkway with overhead canopy and blue neon lighting

agents.ego_description: walking through covered market corridor past food stalls and browsing pedestrians

entered.detail: overhead roof structure covering the walkway with hanging lights
cyan and blue neon strips illuminating the left side of the corridor
long counter with stools and illuminated menu boards

segments.scene_description: The camera enters a covered market corridor with overhead canopies and blue neon lighting. Food stalls with counters and stools line the right side, while pedestrians browse the offerings. The environment is sheltered from the sky with dense commercial signage and a moderate crowd density.

scene_state.functional_zone: enclosed market passage with dense lantern decoration

events.description: entering more enclosed corridor with dense hanging lanterns and reduced visibility

agents.ego_description: walking through the final enclosed corridor toward a distant market checkpoint

entered.detail: covered bridge with wooden beams and dense red lantern strings
yellow and black striped barrier gate at the end of the corridor

segments.scene_description: The final segment moves through an enclosed market passage with dense red paper lanterns hanging overhead. The corridor becomes increasingly narrow with blue floor markings guiding the path. The camera approaches a checkpoint barrier at the end, with atmospheric steam and reduced lighting creating a more enclosed feeling.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a claustrophobic cyberpunk alleyway into a sprawling, neon-lit urban market. It begins by pushing forward through a narrow corridor of wet concrete and tall buildings, passing a green neon open sign and steam vents beneath hanging red lanterns. As the camera turns right, the enclosed space opens into a bustling market square where the lighting shifts to a blend of natural dusk and vibrant neon amidst a denser canopy of lanterns and pedestrian activity. The scene then ascends onto an elevated walkway overlooking the lower stalls and vending machines before descending a set of stairs back to ground level. Finally, the perspective expands to reveal towering digital billboards that dominate the semi-covered environment.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a bustling commercial corridor that transitions from an open-air market into a narrow, atmospheric passage. It begins by entering a covered market area under blue neon lighting, gliding past food stalls and browsing pedestrians beneath dense overhead canopies. As the camera pushes forward, the environment shifts from the wide commercial space into a more enclosed passage dominated by rows of hanging red paper lanterns. The scene then tightens further, following blue floor markings through an increasingly narrow corridor filled with drifting steam. Finally, the movement slows as it approaches a checkpoint barrier under dimmed lighting, completing the transition into a secluded urban artery.
